name: @pryzm/ai-cost
description: PRYZM 2 — AI cost meter (S44 partial / SPEC-28 §5.3 + §4).  Records every AI call into the OTel meter `pryzm.ai.cost.usd` (sum + p95) tagged by surface + plan; tracks running totals against the per-project / per-day / per-call budgets from SPEC-28 §2 so the budget enforcement at S43 D9 has a single source of truth.  PURE: no transport, no API calls, no provider SDKs — the AI subsystem (S52+) imports this and calls record(...) after every model call.  Production meter export wiring lands at S43 D9 cutover (Honeycomb pipeline).
